sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4414" key="a)llhlotupe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλληλο-τῠπέω</orth>, <sense id="n4414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impinge mutually</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:36:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
